tool.name: MaiqMag Training
tool.command: mkdir sim_data && tar -xf $sim_results -C sim_data/ && export TORCHINDUCTOR_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/torchinductor && #if not $varExists('__job_resource.__job_resource__select') or $__job_resource.__job_resource__select=='no' or not $varExists('__job_resource.remote_resource') or $__job_resource.remote_resource !='marble' : #set $pixi_bin="pixi" #set $pixi_manifest_path="/app" #else #set $pixi_bin="/lustre/orion/mat745/proj-shared/maiqmag/pixi/bin/pixi" #set $pixi_manifest_path="/lustre/orion/mat745/proj-shared/maiqmag/maiqmag_train" #end if $pixi_bin run --as-is --manifest-path $pixi_manifest_path python -m maiqmag_ml train --root-dir sim_data --output $model > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
tool.help:
**MaiqMag Resolution Training**
This is a Galaxy tool to train the resolution model using Sunny/McVine digital twin simulations. It can ron on a VM with GPU or on Frontier.
